entities.name: God
entities.description: An uncreated spirit, essentialie taken, and agreeth unto the three persons notionally.

entities.name: Satan/the Devil
entities.critique: The suggestion of the wicked spirit, of the divell, and of satan.

entities.name: Pneumatomachi
entities.description: A sect that denies the divinity of the Holy Spirit, viewing it as a divine force rather than God.

entities.name: Hilarie
entities.description: A writer of the Trinity who is cited as an object of debate regarding whether the Holy Spirit is to be worshipped.

entities.name: Ambrose
entities.description: A father of the church who expounds on the meaning of spirit in Amos.

entities.name: Eusebius
entities.description: A writer cited regarding the creation of the spirit.

entities.name: Isaie/Isaiah
entities.description: A prophet whose words are used to describe the Holy Spirit as water and fire.

entities.name: Jeremze/Jeremiah
entities.description: A prophet whose words are used to describe the fiery nature of the spirit.

entities.name: John/St. John
entities.description: A biblical figure whose words are used to discuss the water of life and the nature of the spirit.

entities.name: Moses
entities.description: A biblical figure whose words are used to discuss the punishment for lack of the spirit.

entities.name: Pan
entities.description: A figure mentioned in relation to error and drunkenness.

entities.name: Cyril
entities.description: Cited regarding the use of oil as a metaphor for God's mercy.

entities.name: Adam/the elect
entities.description: Those who are renewed and made apt by the training up of the holy spirit.

entities.name: Witchcrafts/Incantations
entities.description: False and evil spirits and practices that cannot stand the trial of the spirit of truth.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Water
entities./description: Metaphorical representation of the spirit as water that washes, comforts, and makes fruitful.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Fire
entities.description: Metaphorical representation of the spirit as fire that purifies and cleanses.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Oil/Anointing
entities.description: Metaphorical representation of the spirit as anointing or ointment that makes one fit for office.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Finger of God
entities.description: Metaphorical representation of the spirit as the might and power of God.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Truth/Touchstone
entities.description: Metaphorical representation of the spirit as a touchstone to try all counterfeit devises and vain sciences.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Wind/Breath
entities.type/description: The Hebrew word r'ach signifies spirit, wind, blast, or breath.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Error/Blindness
entities.description: A spirit of error and blindness that inhabits where sin has dominion.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Slumber/Drunkenness
entities.description: A spirit of slumber, giddiness, and error.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Adoption/Abba Father
entities.description: The spirit of adoption that allows us to cry 'Abba, Father'.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Truth/Touchstone
entities.description: The spirit of truth that tests all counterfeit devises and vain sciences.

entities.name: The Holy Spirit as Wind/Breath
entities./description: The Hebrew word r'ach signifies spirit, wind, blast, or breath.
